title: Safety Utility Knife
summary: Safety utility knife supplier for warehouse, retail, and industrial cutting programs, with ABS/TPR handle, high-carbon steel blade, OEM logo, color, packaging, and QC support.
sellingPoints: OEM handle color and packaging support

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Custom logo printing and Pantone color accepted

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: Hanging card, blister packaging, customizable printing

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

quality: Blade exposure and safety function check
Handle grip, shell assembly and surface review
Cutting, lock and retraction performance test
Packaging, barcode and carton mark inspection
targetBuyers: Warehouse supply buyers, industrial distributors, hardware importers, safety tool wholesalers, and private-label utility knife brands
